title: 开源个好玩的 Agent Skill，现在 Star 400 多个
content: An open-source, reusable single-page SEO audit Agent Skill has gained over 400 GitHub stars. Created from personal SEO pain points, it takes a URL and outputs a structured HTML audit report with actionable fix recommendations. Users install it via npx, run audits, review business-relevant findings, then feed reports to AI coding assistants like Cursor or Claude Code for implementation. The project is free and welcomes contributions.

title: 淘宝闪购新进展：外卖和零售双线目标进一步明确｜36氪独家 | 原文
content: Taobao Flash Purchase held a core executive meeting before the May Day holiday to set growth plans for fiscal year 2027 (April 2026–March 2027). Its two main goals are: achieving monthly unit economics profitability for food delivery while maintaining market share, and boosting retail business by investing in Taobao Convenience Stores, Freshippo front warehouses, and shifting Tmall Supermarket and brands from distant to near delivery. The retail order target is to stabilize at 20 million daily orders in coming months.

title: 欧洲再曝光迷奸网络 荷兰8人涉案 | 原文
content: Dutch police identified eight male suspects in Rotterdam on June 4 for allegedly drugging and raping women, producing and distributing sexual assault videos, and sharing illegally obtained photos of victims in private social media groups. The investigation originated from information provided by German and British authorities. The police have not confirmed whether the suspects are of Chinese ethnicity, following earlier similar cases involving Chinese men in Britain and Germany.

title: 「开源」知返(Ahadiff)--vibe coding 之后，你真的学到东西了吗？让知返为你解决
content: Ahadiff is an open-source Python tool that explains AI-generated code changes to help developers learn rather than blindly approve edits. It converts diffs into structured lessons with cited claims, quizzes, and FSRS-based spaced repetition cards. Features include challenge mode for self-testing, concept graphs linking recurring ideas across changes, eight-dimensional quality scoring, and automated improvement reruns. It supports local processing for privacy, multiple AI providers, Anki export, and IDE integrations. Install via pip; core commands are `ahadiff learn` and `ahadiff serve`.

title: Games Between Programs: The Ruliology of Competition

title: 「重返 Web2.0」！扎克伯格重做了一个「百度贴吧」，Why？ | 原文
content: Meta quietly launched Forum, a retro-style app featuring only text, images, posts, interest groups, and human discussions—resembling early 2000s forums like Baidu Tieba. This marks a shift from Meta's previous heavy metaverse investments toward simpler, human-centric social interaction. The move values authentic human conversation in an era increasingly dominated by AI-generated content.

title: “小山姆”成商场新顶流，有门店一月爆卖600万，巨头疯狂押注
content: "Fresh snacks" are emerging as a new retail trend in China, with brands like Jiduoquan, Jinlimen, Yili, and Puppet Mother expanding rapidly in mall B1 locations. These stores emphasize short shelf-life products, clean labels, and quality over low prices, often positioning themselves as accessible alternatives to Sam's Club. The segment attracts established players with strong supply chains, as barriers include high investment costs, complex inventory management, and maintaining consumer trust. Despite profit margins of 30-42% exceeding discount snack chains at 15%, challenges remain in controlling spoilage, scaling production, and preventing quality control failures during rapid expansion.

title: 突发：OpenAI芯片元老加入Anthropic
content: Clive Chan, the second hire on OpenAI's hardware team, announced his departure from OpenAI to join rival AI firm Anthropic. Chan, who joined OpenAI in January 2024 and worked on its self-developed chip project, praised OpenAI's chip team talent but cited his desire for a new challenge. His move follows other high-profile OpenAI-to-Anthropic transfers, including co-founder Andrej Karpathy in May. Chan revealed little about OpenAI's chip progress beyond publicly disclosed plans with Broadcom to deploy a 10GW AI accelerator system starting in second-half 2026.

title: 据中央电视台报道，中国启动了面向数据中心的预制式电力枢纽项目

title: 光通信的下一个焦点：Scale-Up 里的 NPO
content: Near-Package Optics (NPO) is emerging as a critical near-term solution for AI system Scale-Up interconnects, addressing the bottleneck of organizing more chips into larger computing units with lower latency and power consumption. While Co-Packaged Optics (CPO) remains a longer-term direction, NPO offers a pragmatic middle ground—positioning optical engines closer to chips than traditional pluggable modules without CPO's complex integration challenges. Key industry signals include STMicroelectronics' potential capacity expansion for silicon photonics driven by NPO demand. The technology's core barriers lie in silicon photonic integrated circuit (PIC) design capabilities and securing leading-edge PIC production capacity. Major Chinese optical module suppliers like Zhongji Innolight and Eoptolink are positioned to benefit as NPO transitions them from module manufacturers to AI optical interconnect system providers.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 彼得罗浮斯基

Three Chinese suppliers reportedly serve the North American NPO supply chain: Innolight, Eoptolink, and TFC. The author emphasizes rational investing, avoiding emotional stock attachment, and independent thinking. Regarding market panic over the weekend, the author predicts a Monday low-open, high-close pattern, noting Friday's US market already priced in Fed rate hike expectations. The Shanghai Index has pulled back to its 100-day moving average; previous similar dips recovered. A-share concentration hasn't reached historical highs, and current AI participation differs from past cycles. For Shennan Circuit, the author views declines as opportunities, dismissing negative news as irrelevant to fundamentals.

title: 锂电池本周行业更新6-6
content: Lithium carbonate inventories continued declining, though destocking slowed as production rose 797 tons, pressuring prices. Ore exports from Southern Africa face restrictions, while the DRC may raise lithium royalties. Europe's NEV sales grew 33% in May; China's NEV wholesale also rebounded to positive year-over-year growth. Chile's May carbonate exports to China fell 41% month-on-month. The report argues H2 will see significant supply deficits as demand surges nonlinearly while mining supply lags, with multiple project delays. Prices at 160,000–170,000 RMB/ton reflect a fundamental supply reversal rather than speculation, with the cycle still in its early ascending phase.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 柯中

title: GitCode/AtomCode 第三方客户端来了，得到官方认可的那种！
content: AtGit is an unofficial GitCode/AtomGit client with official recognition. It operates without servers and collects no user data. The app enables browsing source code, managing issues and pull requests, starring, watching, forking projects, and following repositories and developers. Available on Huawei AppGallery at the provided link; more information at https://atgit.xiaobingkj.com/.

title: CPO规模商用在即，A股参与度简评
content: CPO commercialization is accelerating following NVIDIA's 2026 Spectrum-x announcement. Chinese A-share supply chain participants include: first-tier Robotechnik (coupling/testing equipment) and Dongshan Precision (high-power lasers, InP PIC/OE, advanced packaging, ~40% TAM); second-tier Tianfu Communication and TGC Optoelectronics (passive components, ~15% TAM); third-tier Innolight and Eoptolink (potential OE/OSA outsourcing). Dongshan Precision became the first listed company with formal CPO production.

title: 地摊设备暴涨600%，夜市摆摊大军回来了
content: Night markets are booming across China as cities invest in "night economy" infrastructure, with stall equipment sales surging 600%. Markets are evolving from chaotic street vending into regulated cultural complexes with unified design, sanitation standards, and differentiated positioning—some targeting students, others tourists or specific cuisines. However, increased competition, supply chain homogenization, and rising costs have made profitability harder. Social media myths of easy riches have faded after exposed scams. While star chefs and major restaurants briefly joined the trend for marketing, most have retreated due to quality control challenges. Successful night market operations now require strategic location selection, product differentiation, and customer retention rather than simply chasing viral moments.

title: 大家会不会反复回忆已经过去的小事，想着“当时如果这样做就好了”？
content: A person describes a habit of compulsively replaying past minor events, imagining better outcomes and questioning their decisions, despite knowing rationally that nothing serious resulted. They recognize this pattern across multiple situations and ask if others experience similar repetitive rumination, seeking strategies to reduce such unproductive mental replay and post-hoc optimization of trivial past events.

title: 闲暇时刻，要学会避免内耗
content: Unplanned leisure time spent aimlessly browsing or starting and abandoning projects drains mental energy. Instead, either make concrete plans before beginning work—such as analyzing products, studying, coding specific features, or reading—or step away from the computer to spend time with family or go outside. Limit multitasking with AI agents to three or fewer to reduce context-switching fatigue.

title: Field of clones: How horse replicas came to dominate polo
content: Polo has become dominated by cloned horses, as replicas of elite polo ponies now make up a significant portion of the sport's competitors. This shift toward cloned animals has transformed the field, raising questions about how genetic duplication has changed traditional breeding practices and the competitive landscape of polo.

title: 一天热死3400人，印度也要限制中国空调 | 原文

Social media users express frustration through memes depicting the sun as an enemy. The crisis intensifies as India considers restricting Chinese air conditioner imports, highlighting tensions between addressing public health needs and trade policies amid worsening climate conditions.

title: 全球Top4，在线人数暴涨3800%：为了“钱”一大批人边骂边玩？
content:
**Task Bar Hero: The Free Desktop Idle RPG Surging to Top 4 Global Steam Rankings**

Task Bar Hero, a free desktop idle RPG by Korean studios Nugem Studio and Tesseract Studio, has surged to over 260,000 concurrent players, ranking fourth globally on Steam. The game features minimalist taskbar-based automation, character progression through equipment upgrades, and a player-driven trading economy that enables zero-cost access to paid DLC.

Despite initial "overwhelmingly positive" reviews, rapid growth exposed critical server overloads, loot drop anomalies, and black screen bugs, triggering two waves of negative reviews. The developers tightened trading restrictions and attributed reduced drop rates to Steam API limitations rather than deliberate changes. The core tension remains: balancing the trading feature that drives both popularity and instability, while serving regular players and profit-seeking "gold farmers" simultaneously.

Developed by two small teams (8 and 4 members respectively) with prior idle RPG

title: 用了 AI 之后，公司好像更穷了
content: Companies adopted AI expecting cost savings but face ballooning expenses. Token consumption—AI's usage-based "electricity"—escalates as adoption spreads from individuals to teams to 24/7 autonomous agents. Goodhart's Law strikes: making token usage a target incentivizes wasteful behavior. Multi-agent systems amplify costs through endless confirmation loops, burning 30-60% of tokens on non-productive coordination. Uber exhausted annual AI budgets in months; Microsoft and Amazon restricted access to curb spending. Firms now prioritize ROI, swapping expensive models for cheaper alternatives like DeepSeek, recognizing AI scales costs rather than benefits.

title: 大厂“电子吧唧”，“手表边角料”收割二次元？
content: Major tech firms are marketing small circular magnetic screens as "digital badges" (电子吧唧) targeting anime and idol fandoms. OPPO's ¥499 Bubble screen and similar products from Insta360 cost 4-5× more than generic ¥99 alternatives. Store staff struggle with basic operations; consumers question value. The devices functionally resemble failed 2017 Meizu "paint screens." True fans prefer physical collectible craftsmanship; casual users see no need for premium pricing. Hardware compatibility issues and required accessories further hurt adoption. The real play appears to be virtual gacha-style content sales, not hardware innovation.

title: Harness engineering: Leveraging Codex in an agent-first world
content: Harness engineering focuses on building effective systems for AI agents rather than just traditional human-centric tools. The approach prioritizes agent-first design, using OpenAI's Codex as a core component. The discussion on Hacker News explores how software engineering practices must evolve as AI agents become primary users of development tools and systems.

The piece follows China's first official ban on such schools in Sichuan Province, addressing two decades of victim activism since Yang Yongxin's notorious Shandong internet addiction center.

A SemiAnalysis report stating Nvidia's Vera Rubin system DRAM would be halved from 55TB to 28TB caused memory stocks to plunge. However, this misinterprets the change: Nvidia cut only SOCAMM standard memory (from 192GB to 96GB), not HBM4, which remains at 288GB per GPU. The reduction reflects HBM supply constraints and wafer capacity trade-offs, not weakening AI demand. Nvidia confirmed HBM4 from SK Hynix, Samsung, and Micron has all qualified and entered mass production. Nvidia is diversifying its supplier base to ensure supply security and gain pricing leverage, intensifying competition among the three memory manufacturers.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 陆家嘴幽灵

title: 从可灵到 Gemini，AI 视频集体告别“抽卡模式”：导演模型要火？
content: AI video generation is shifting from random "gacha" outputs to controllable, editable production tools. Recent models like Google's Gemini Omni, Runway's Aleph 2.0, China's Kling O1, and Seedance 2.0 enable iterative editing, multimodal inputs, and workflow integration rather than one-shot generation. This transforms creators from software operators into "model directors" who control intent, pacing, and shot design. The competitive advantage shifts from technical execution to clearly articulating creative vision and directing AI adjustments.

title: DoD Officially Drops 180 Faiths from Military's Recognized Religion List
content: The Department of Defense removed 180 faith groups from its official list of recognized religions for military personnel, reducing the number from 221 to 41. The list determines which faiths receive support from military chaplains and are included on official documents such as dog tags. Critics argue the change may limit religious accommodation for service members. The DOD stated the update aligns the list with chaplain endorsement requirements and federal guidelines.

title: Meta 考虑大规模股权融资加码 AI 基础设施，股价应声下跌
content: Meta is considering a large-scale equity raise, potentially selling tens of billions in new shares, to fund AI infrastructure expansion. Its 2026 capital expenditure guidance was raised to $125–145 billion, nearly double 2025 levels. Combined AI capex for four major tech firms may exceed $700 billion in 2026. Markets worry about Meta's AI returns; bond demand has cooled and costs outpace revenue growth. CEO Zuckerberg lacks a precise monetization plan, triggering a stock drop. Analysts view the AI race as a capital competition.

title: SpaceX 与谷歌达成每月 9.2 亿美元的云服务协议
content: SpaceX and Google signed a cloud computing agreement worth $920 million monthly from October 2026 to June 2029. Google will receive access to approximately 110,000 Nvidia GPUs and related components, with computing capacity ramping up before September at reduced rates. If SpaceX fails to deliver the agreed GPU quantity by September 30, 2026, Google may terminate the deal after one month or accept partial delivery with proportional fee reduction. Either party can terminate with 90 days' notice after December 31, 2026. Google retains ownership of its content, AI models, and data.

title: Meta 据悉考虑对消费者 AI Agent 收取每月 200 美元的费用
content: Meta is reportedly considering charging consumers $200 per month for its AI agent service. This potential pricing strategy reflects the company's plans to monetize its consumer-facing artificial intelligence offerings.

title: 高通宣布车端人工智能 Claw 生态计划
content: At its 2026 Automotive Technology and Partnership Summit, Qualcomm announced the Claw ecosystem initiative with partners including Chengmai Technology, Che Lian Tianxia, Banma Intelligent, Desay SV, Megatronix, and Thundersoft. The program aims to deploy AI agents and multimodal large language models directly on vehicles.

title: 数据中心开发商 Switch 洽谈数十亿美元融资，投后估值超 500 亿美元
content: Switch is in early-stage talks for a multibillion-dollar funding round that would value the data center developer above $50 billion, with Brookfield and KKR among potential investors. The valuation would be roughly quintuple its 2022 take-private price. The company, which went private in 2022 after a 2017 IPO, has hired Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan for a possible 2026 IPO. SoftBank abandoned a near-$50 billion acquisition bid in early 2026 due to deal complexity.

或者大家用什么客户端？

title: 让AI自我构建的RSI火了，Google泼冷水，DeepSeek们摸到了边
content: Recursive self-improvement (RSI)—AI training itself without human involvement—is gaining traction in the AI industry. Startups like Recursive Superintelligence and projects like Andrej Karpathy's Auto-Research are pursuing this goal, while Anthropic's Claude already writes nearly all of its own code. Google CEO Sundar Pichai cautions that true RSI remains distant. China rarely uses the term, but DeepSeek and Baidu employ similar self-optimization techniques. Key obstacles include model collapse from degraded training data, prohibitive costs, limited compute, and fragmented global collaboration. Some experts anticipate rapid acceleration if AI reaches human-parity research capability, while others predict bottlenecks.

title: 美股恐慌性暴跌，加息只是导火索
content:
周五晚上，美股发生恐慌性暴跌。纳指下跌了4%以上。这两天的回调把一个月的涨幅都给磨平了。 从表面上看是非农就业数据大超预期，市场开始押注今年将加息。于是美股暴跌。

黄金跌破4400美元，白银更是暴跌8.1%。

真的是这样吗？

咱们看看欧洲股市，虽然受到非农数据的影响，但跌幅很小。

另外一边…
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 睿知睿见

title: Anthropic全球警告，OpenAI已跨“可靠性阈值”：AI自我加速启动
content: Anthropic warns that AI has reached a threshold of recursive self-improvement, where models now accelerate their own development. OpenAI's Yann Dubois confirms that AI capability growth is continuous, but user-perceived usefulness jumped discretely around December 2024 when reliability crossed a critical threshold. Dubois describes AI development as craft rather than science, driven by intuition and trial-and-error. He argues that current models, if frozen and optimized through vertical application harnesses, could achieve AGI in many domains. The remaining bottleneck is not model intelligence but integration, permissions, data connectivity, and continual learning capabilities.

title: Static Devirtualization of Themida
content: A discussion on Hacker News covers static devirtualization techniques for Themida, a software protection and virtualization系统 that obfuscates code to prevent reverse engineering. The topic involves analyzing and converting virtualized machine code back to its original or equivalent native form through static analysis methods, without executing the protected program.

title: 孙宇晨最新预言: Al主线彻底洗牌 未来4个风口
content: Justin Sun predicts a major shift from virtual AI to "physical AI"—AI embedded in hardware that interacts with the real world. He identifies four key sectors: humanoid robots (focusing on core components like sensors and motors rather than finished products), autonomous driving, industrial simulation and perception, and energy/storage infrastructure. Major industry figures like NVIDIA's Jensen Huang and institutions including Morgan Stanley and IDC share this outlook, projecting trillions in global investment and market growth by 2040. Sun advises investors to avoid chasing robot manufacturers, prioritize companies with actual orders over concept stocks, and watch overlooked energy and storage segments where demand already exceeds supply.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 午后反攻

title: 一个疯狂的想法：用本体论抽象一个现实
content: The author argues that large language models remain in early development, with their engineering particularly immature. The core problem is not model hallucination itself but flawed interaction methods—direct text prompting is inadequate since LLMs fundamentally perform mathematical computation using language tokens. The proposed solution involves inserting an ontological layer between humans and models: a human-built semantic space mapping reality that ensures only verified concepts enter calculations. The "crazy idea" suggests investing in a comprehensive real-world knowledge graph through language abstraction, rather than solely expanding model parameters. The author questions whether symbolic AI (ontology) and behaviorism (reinforcement learning), like connectionism (LLMs), might transform qualitatively at sufficient scale, proposing their integration through agents as AI's true path forward.
